title: Source Segments
description: Normalized subtitle segments used as the single source of truth before chunking. Both official-caption and ASR paths must write to this contract. Time轴不可丢失 — start/end are mandatory and must be preserved by all downstream modules.

segments.description: List of subtitle segments. Each segment MUST contain start, end, and text — these fields must not be dropped by any processing step.

start.description: Start time in seconds (float). Must be preserved exactly — do not round or drop.

end.description: End time in seconds (float). Must be preserved exactly — do not round or drop.

words.description: Optional word-level timestamps preserved from ASR. Downstream splitters may use these to refine subtitle timing.
